## System Information

| Field                | Value                          |
|----------------------|-------------------------------|
| Linux Distribution   | e.g. Ubuntu 24.04              |
| Desktop Environment  | e.g. GNOME 46 / XFCE 4.18     |
| GTK Version          | e.g. GTK 3.24 / GTK 4.12      |
| Window Manager       | e.g. Mutter / XFWM4 / Openbox |
| Display Server       | e.g. X11 / Wayland             |

## Installation Method

- [ ] Automatic installer (`./install.sh`)
- [ ] Distro-specific installer (e.g. `distros/ubuntu/install.sh`)
- [ ] System-wide install (`sudo ./install.sh --system`)
- [ ] Manual copy
